item.title: Kommentar zu EU CAPTCHA: Führender europäischer CAPTCHA-Anbieter von reCAPTCHA-Alternativen im Vergleich: reCAPTCHA gegen hCAPTCHA gegen Friendly Captcha - Friendly Captcha
item.dc:creator: reCAPTCHA Alternatives Compared: reCAPTCHA vs hCAPTCHA vs Friendly Captcha - Friendly Captcha

item.dc:creator: Cookie Usage of CAPTCHA Services Compared - Friendly Captcha
item.description: […] domain. hCaptcha uses cookies as well to provide its service and functionality like its passive mode. One of these cookies stores a unique identifier for each user, which potentially allows hCaptcha […]
item.content:encoded: […] domain. hCaptcha uses cookies as well to provide its service and functionality like its passive mode. One of these cookies stores a unique identifier for each user, which potentially allows hCaptcha […]

item.title: Kommentar zu CAPTCHA Cookies: Cookie Nutzung von CAPTCHA-Diensten im Vergleich von Location Matters: Warum ein EU-CAPTCHA-Anbieter wichtiger denn je ist - Friendly Captcha
item.dc:creator: Location Matters: Why an EU CAPTCHA Provider Is More Important Than Ever - Friendly Captcha
item.description: […] Friendly Captcha is an European Captcha provider based in Germany and hosted in the EU. It’s focused on privacy and accessibility and can be configured to prevent personal data from being transferred to countries outside the EU. Friendly Captcha is subject to the highest European data protection standards and doesn’t collect any personal information about your website users and doesn’t use cookies. […]
item.content:encoded: […] Friendly Captcha is an European Captcha provider based in Germany and hosted in the EU. It’s focused on privacy and accessibility and can be configured to prevent personal data from being transferred to countries outside the EU. Friendly Captcha is subject to the highest European data protection standards and doesn’t collect any personal information about your website users and doesn’t use cookies. […]
